# Commerce Sync Module

Module ID: commerce-sync
Status: draft
Purpose: Provider-neutral commerce connections, mappings, sync runs, webhook receipts, and normalized payload envelopes.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Primary use cases: createCommerceConnection, recordProviderMapping, startSyncRun, completeSyncRun, recordWebhookReceipt, normalizeCommercePayload, normalizeCommerceProviderPayload, verifyWooCommerceWebhookSignature.
WooCommerce normalization: customers use billing contact fallback, products use WC-ID SKU fallback and cent prices, orders map WC statuses and preserve billing/shipping, line, shipping, coupon, tax, discount, and total cents.
WooCommerce webhook signatures are base64 HMAC-SHA256 over the raw payload body.
WooCommerceClient fetches customers, products, orders, and categories through the REST API with Basic Auth and pagination headers; it never writes local module tables directly.
